content: Recovery decision: refine the developer prompt and let TDD retry once.

function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"action":"refine_prompt","diagnosis":"Developer loop stopped short of submitting files_modified. Refining the prompt to require the explicit file list in submit_work so the next TDD cycle terminates cleanly.","refined_prompt":"On submit_work, always include files_modified with the actual files you wrote (e.g. api/app.py, api/test_goodbye.py). Empty arrays or missing fields will be rejected by the developer-terminal validator.","recovery_succeeded":true}
